feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Shipping Point assign to several Plants which are in more than one country.
entry.content:
Hello, Gurus

According to the Learning Hub,

Global entities can be assigned to organizational structures in one or more countries. For example, a Shipping Point can be assigned to several Plants which are in more than one country.

Is it possible ? 

Thank you in advance

Park.

entry.title: Void unused cheque
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

How to void unused cheque in SAP Public cloud?

We are unable to find the option in manage outgoing checks application.

In on premise we could do so using transaction code FCH3.

Thanks!!

entry.title: CDS view to find the Classification characteristic description field for a supplier
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am currently trying to implement Flexible workflow for PO on SAP public cloud based on the condition that if the Suppliers Classification characteristic description i.e.  P2P exemption is Yes/No. but i am unbale to find the CDS view linking the Supplier/Business partner and the Classification data for them. could you guys help if you know of any CDS view that i can link to achieve this requirement.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re-issue voided check
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We are unable to find the option of re-issuing voided check in  SAP public cloud.

We had this functionality in on-premise to delete check information and re-issue the check in case it has been mistakenly voided after issue.

Kindly advise.

entry.title: Intercompany payment runs through an international account
entry.content:
Posting on behalf of my finance team:

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA public cloud for a UK based client which has multiple companies in UK and NL.  They are unable to pay a NL company invoice on a payment run through a NL account as this entity does not have a bank account.  Workarounds with dummy accounts have been suggested, but can you explain why international bank payments are not standard SAP practice in SAP S/4HANA public cloud?

entry.title: Balancing Field "Profit Center" in line item 006 not filled
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am trying to post Logistic invoice verification with unplanned delivery cost through EDI (RD04). After maintaining all the entries I am getting the error - 

'Balancing Field "Profit Center" in line item 006 not filled'

Message no. GLT2201

Diagnosis

The field Profit Center marked as balancing is not filled with any value in line item 006, even after document splitting.

System Response

The document cannot be posted.

Procedure

First check your entries.

Additional causes could be:

No value can be derived for this field from the current document data.

You have entered a document type that is not designed for this business purpose.

any suggestions on how to solve this will be appreciated...

Regards,

Ajinkya.

entry.title: How to Mass Import Worker Data for Concurrent Employment?
entry.content:
I need to create a lot of employee and some employes has Concurrent Employment, but I do not found a template that have the field "employement situation" to insert the option "Concurrent Employment" in app F6097 - Manage Wokforce. 

When I use the template "Templ_WorkAgreement_Semicolon" and try insert more than one cost center for the one employe the system show the error: "The dates for the Job Details entity shouldn't overlap"

Is it possible to mass import tWorker Data for Concurrent Employment?

entry.title: Positive Pay Output File Format
entry.content:
Hello,

Customer uses a positive pay file in CSV and sends this to the bank. In SAP, the standard format is US_POSIPAY which is a TXT file format.

Is there any way to change the file format to produce a CSV format in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud 2402

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud use of shared e-mail addresses
entry.content:
Dear all,

Is it possible to use a shared email address in SAP s/4hana cloud?

If possible, are there any precautions?

thanks in advance

entry.title: Finding the Header Notes for Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need to create a custom Data Model using the data source Purchase Requisition. However, the data source I_PurchaseRequisitionItemAPI01 and its association _PurchaseRequisition which I am currently using, does not contain the field Header Notes. Where can I find the field?

Many thanks

entry.title: How to hidden parameter element with ABAP public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to hide parameters with conditions.

 

You can see the attachment image below :Parameter Data Defination

Behavior Defination

Example: hide parameter element Company (P_Company) when ReportID equals 'API1' or 'TB'.

Web appPlease help me. Thanks and best Regards

Daroi

entry.title: S4HC- Create the billing document for down payment
entry.content:
I would like to know if i can create the invoice for the down payment amount immediately upon receiving the money.

I want to create two invoices instead of issuing one invoice for the total amount at the end.

thanks~

entry.title: Created accrual item types cannot be selected in accrual account determination config.(public cloud)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have a question related purchase order accruals configuration.

We have created Z* accrual item types. When we try to assign different accounts for each different accrual item type in PER_ACCR_ACCNT field, we realised we cannot see these newly created Z* accrual item types in Accrual Item Type field. There are only standard accrual item types.

Is it standard behaviour of public cloud and are we not able to use Z* accrual item types?

entry.title: Migration of Legacy Data to SAP Public Cloud: An Overview and Key Questions
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We are currently facing the challenge of migrating legacy data to the SAP Cloud, Public Edition. We know and also recommend to our client to not migrate legacy data in SAP Public Cloud for Controlling purposes. Our goal is to migrate values up to the end of the fiscal year 2023 and subsequently capture monthly P&L values for controlling purposes. In this context, we have several specific questions regarding the migration process that we would like to share and discuss with you:

Question 1: Is it possible to migrate monthly values in SAP Public Cloud?

We want to ensure that our monthly values can be migrated correctly and completely to the SAP Public Cloud. Are there any best practices or specific tools that can assist us in this process?

Question 2: General and subsidiary ledgers in SAP must always be reconciled - does this mean that all objects need to be migrated monthly?

An important question for us is whether it is necessary to migrate all objects monthly to ensure that the general and subsidiary ledgers are always reconciled. Are there specific requirements or best practices we should follow in this regard?

Question 3: Migration of the asset subledger: Should this be migrated as of 31.12.23, and then all asset movements for 2024 be booked in SAP?

Our consideration is to migrate the asset subledger as of December 31, 2023, and subsequently book all asset movements for the year 2024 in SAP. Is this approach sensible, and are there any specific challenges we should be aware of?

Question 4: Can theoretically only P&L values be migrated monthly on their own?

Another point we would like to discuss is the possibility of migrating only the P&L values monthly, without considering other data. Is this feasible and advisable in the SAP Public Cloud?

Question 5: What options are available in SAP Public Cloud Controlling Apps or functionalities to migrate or upload these legacy data for CO comparisons with the previous year?

We are looking for effective solutions to migrate or upload our legacy data for CO comparisons with the previous year. What Controlling Apps or functionalities does the SAP Public Cloud offer to achieve this?

Question 6: What options does the customer have in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to analyze their legacy data on a monthly basis for CO purposes?

Lastly, we are interested in understanding the options available in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to analyze legacy data on a monthly basis for CO purposes. What tools or functionalities can be utilized to create detailed analyses and reports?

We look forward to your experiences, tips, and best practices on these topics and are eager for a constructive discussion!

Best regards,

Mara

entry.title: AR - Open Items Migration in SAP Public Cloud: Interface Integration vs. Upload Template
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

As we continue to navigate the complexities of migrating our legacy data to the SAP Public Cloud, we have encountered a specific question regarding the migration of open items in the subledger. We are exploring whether it is possible to import open items using an interface instead of the standard upload template. Here are the key points we would like to discuss:

Is it possible to import subledger open items using an interface instead of the upload template?

We are considering the feasibility of using an interface to import subledger open items. Has anyone in the community successfully utilized an interface for this purpose, and if so, what were the benefits and challenges encountered?

Does the SAP Migration Cockpit accept interfaces for open items migration, or must the general and subledger always match using the migration templates?

We are also interested in understanding whether the SAP Migration Cockpit supports the use of interfaces for migrating open items. Is it mandatory for general and subledger data to always match using the predefined migration templates, or is there flexibility in the method of data import?

Understanding the best approach for migrating open items is crucial for the accuracy and integrity of our financial data. We appreciate any insights, experiences, or best practices you can share regarding the use of interfaces versus upload templates for this aspect of the migration process.

Thank you for your support and contributions to this discussion!

Best regards,

Mara

entry.title: GST Relevance for Free of Charge Deliveries in India
entry.content:
Dear Community,

 

we have an implementation project in India and there is the legal requirement to pay tax also on sales orders without charge.

The customer shall not get any information about the tax and there should also no open item on FI side.

The means we want to calculate the tax before we are deducting the 100% discount (or on basis of the original net amount) and want to post it with the billing document on the tax account and on an accruals account, since we do not want to have it on the receivables account. 

We found information for the for on Prem systems and tried to rebuild it in the public cloud but without success.

Independent what we are doing in customizing we are getting accounting errors (without specific information in the error) or it is not a real tax posting.

Do you know how to set up the functionality within the public cloud? Is there any process you know how to solve the requirement?

Thank you in advance!

Kind regards,

entry.title: Define Number Intervals for Checks
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

On SAP S4 Public Cloud, i need to find the app to define checks intervals (FCHI tcode on S4 On premise). I can already use the App "manage outgoing check", but first i need to define check lot with intervals. 

Could you please tell me if there is a special scope to activate it, or maybe give me the App's ID ? I can't find it, neither on CBC.

Many thanks for your help.

 

Kind regards,

 

Winston

entry.title: integration with subcontracting cockpit app, for goods issue
entry.content:
We need to generate an integration in sap public cloud, for our customer, with which we can make the goods issues for subcontracting orders.

I can't find a way to associate the creation of the goods issue to the subcontracting order with the subcontracting cockpit app.

Best regards, thank you in advance

entry.title: Release Blocked Document without authorization
entry.content:
Approvers outside of the approver groups defines in the "Hierarchies for the Approval Process of Documented Credit Decisions" can release documented credit decisions.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: DE_CGI_XML_CT_V9: Building number appended to street name
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Using a copy of DE_CGI_XML_CT_V9, I noticed that the building number (N_2528565240 - BldgNb) is not populated.

The building number node appears to be empty. It has an empty constant:

Instead, the building number appears to be appended to the street name node (N_0177746670 - StrNm) using the FPAYHX-REF09+070(60) field:

I did some tinkering and filled the <BldgNb> with FPAYHX-REF08+060(10).
But now I still have the duplicate building numbers in <StrNm> and <BldgNb> :

I believe this issue can be addressed for private cloud systems in the following note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3446890

  • All CT Formats - <CdtTrfTxInf><Cdtr><PstlAdr><BldgNb> is filled separately (instead of concatenated value in <StrtNm>)

Is there anything I can do to fix this, or will I have to hope that 2408 fixes this?

Thanks

Simon
